creator: ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru
text:
On Thu, 10 Aug 2006 09:32:21 -0400
Wesley Shields <wxs@atarininja.org> mentioned:

> On Sun, Aug 06, 2006 at 06:21:17PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> > Maintainer of audio/easytag,
> >=20
> > Please note that PR ports/101471 has just been submitted.
> >=20
> > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> > and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> Unless I've missed something I don't think it is necessary to remove the
> stuff in share/locale/ because they were not put there by easytag.
> However, the part pertaining to %%DATADIR%% can be committed.  I've
> attached a patch for this.
>=20

No, you should remove them for they don't listed in BSD.local.dist.

Thus, if you package is installed into different prefix they will
not be removed on uninstall.

Port should deinstall all files/directories it creates, except they
aren't listed in ${MTREE_FILE}.

--=20
